title: Classic American Pie
description: A traditional American-style pie filled with a sweet and tangy filling, all wrapped up in a flaky puff pastry crust.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch pie dish and trim the edges to fit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the molten, buttery, american, sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, pie spice, and salt.
Pour the filling into the pastry-lined pie dish.
Roll out the remaining pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch and use to cover the pie. Crimp the edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
Brush the top crust with the beaten egg and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake the pie for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove the pie from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before serving.
